pkg/models.purpose: Foundational domain-primitive library shared by every openmeter/* and api/* package: typed GenericXxxError sentinels, the immutable ValidationIssue with-chain, ServiceHookRegistry[T] with re-entrancy prevention, RFC 7807 StatusProblem, FieldDescriptor trees, and CadencedModel half-open intervals. Its one hard constraint is zero imports from openmeter/* — it must remain a pure leaf.

patterns.name: Typed GenericXxxError sentinels
patterns.description: Wrap every domain error in a NewGenericXxxError(err) constructor and detect via IsGenericXxxError(err) (errors.As). Each type has a constructor + checker pair and maps to one HTTP status in the GenericErrorEncoder.

patterns.name: ValidationIssue copy-on-write builder
patterns.description: Construct via NewValidationIssue/NewValidationError/NewValidationWarning; every With* (WithPathString, WithComponent, WithSeverity, WithAttr) clones and returns a new value. AsValidationIssues(err) extracts only ValidationIssue nodes from a mixed error tree — plain errors.New() leaves are skipped.

patterns.name: FieldDescriptor tree for field paths
patterns.description: NewFieldSelector(field) is a leaf; NewFieldSelectorGroup(selectors...) groups siblings (returns nil if all selectors nil); WithExpression attaches a filter, WithPrefix prepends a subtree. String()/JSONPath() DFS only leaf nodes via pkg/treex.

patterns.name: ServiceHookRegistry re-entrancy guard
patterns.description: ServiceHookRegistry[T] fans out PreCreate/PostCreate/PreUpdate/PostUpdate/PreDelete/PostDelete to registered hooks; a pointer-identity context key (loopKey from fmt.Sprintf('%p', r)) blocks infinite recursion when a hook calls back through the same service. Domain services embed *ServiceHookRegistry[T] and expose RegisterHooks.

patterns.name: CadencedModel half-open intervals
patterns.description: Entities active over [ActiveFrom, ActiveTo) embed CadencedModel; IsActiveAt(t) is false when ActiveTo is non-nil and not After(t). CadenceList[T] validates sorted/non-overlapping/continuous sequences via GetOverlaps (O(n) adjacent scan) and IsContinuous (exact ActiveTo==next.ActiveFrom).

patterns.name: Validator interface at service boundaries
patterns.description: Input types implement models.Validator (Validate() error). Call input.Validate() at service entry, then wrap failure in NewGenericValidationError. Compose multiple validators via models.Validate[T].
patterns.example: if err := input.Validate(); err != nil { return nil, models.NewGenericValidationError(err) }

key_file_guides.role: All Generic*Error types plus ErrorWithFieldPrefix/ErrorWithComponent wrappers for structured cross-boundary propagation.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Adding an error type without a matching IsXxxError checker or without wiring it into GenericErrorEncoder leaves it mapped to 500.

key_file_guides.role: Immutable ValidationIssue value; AsValidationIssues traverses error trees; Clone() sets wraps=self so errors.Is chains hold.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Never set the wraps field manually; WithAttr panics on nil/non-comparable keys.

key_file_guides.role: Thread-safe generic hook registry with pointer-identity re-entrancy prevention; init() is lazy via sync.Once.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not compare registries by value — id depends on pointer identity.

key_file_guides.role: FieldDescriptor tree (pkg/treex); WithPrefix/WithExpression are copy-on-write returning new *FieldDescriptor.
key_file_guides.watch_for: NewFieldSelectorGroup with all-nil selectors returns nil — always nil-check before use.

key_file_guides.role: ManagedModel/NamespacedModel/ManagedResource base structs embedded by persistent entities; NewManagedResource normalises to UTC.
key_file_guides.watch_for: IsDeletedAt uses !DeletedAt.After(t) — an entity deleted exactly at t is deleted. Always store UTC.

key_file_guides.role: Annotations map[string]interface{} with Clone (deep), Merge (right-wins), and GetBool/GetString/GetInt typed accessors.
key_file_guides.watch_for: GetInt accepts whole-number float64 (JSON numbers); fractional/out-of-range returns (0,false). Use Equal(), not reflect.DeepEqual.

key_file_guides.role: CadenceList[T] sorted/overlap/continuity validation; GetOverlaps scans adjacent pairs only (assumes sorted input).
key_file_guides.watch_for: IsContinuous requires exact ActiveTo==next.ActiveFrom — nanosecond/timezone drift yields false negatives.

anti_patterns: Importing any openmeter/* domain package — pkg/models must stay a leaf.
Mutating a ValidationIssue or FieldDescriptor in place — all With* methods clone; direct field assignment corrupts shared instances.
Returning plain errors.New() where ValidationIssue is expected — AsValidationIssues cannot extract raw errors.
Using reflect.DeepEqual for Annotations/ValidationIssue equality instead of the provided Equal() methods.
Constructing a 500 StatusProblem with Detail set — NewStatusProblem suppresses detail on 500 to avoid internal leaks.

decisions.decision: ValidationIssue uses a private constructor plus copy-on-write With* methods rather than a mutable builder.
decisions.rationale: Guarantees every instance is valid at construction (code+message) and prevents shared mutation as issues pass through error-wrapping layers.

decisions.decision: ServiceHookRegistry blocks re-entrancy with a pointer-identity context key.
decisions.rationale: A hook (e.g. ledger on customer.PostCreate) may call back into the same service; the sentinel stops infinite recursion without hooks knowing about each other.

decisions.decision: FieldDescriptor is a tree (pkg/treex), not a dot-delimited string.
decisions.rationale: Enables WithPrefix composition from outer layers, structured JSONPath generation for API error payloads, and per-node attribute attachment.

code_examples.scenario: Return a structured ValidationIssue with field path and HTTP status from a domain service

pkg/pagination.purpose: Offset-based pagination primitives (Page, Result[T], Paginator[T], CollectAll) used by every domain List method, with a cursor-based v2 sub-package for time+ID keyset pagination. Constraint: list code must use these types — never compute SQL OFFSET/LIMIT in handlers, and never mix offset and cursor contracts on one endpoint.

patterns.name: Page/Result contract for List methods
patterns.description: List methods embed pagination.Page (1-based PageNumber + PageSize) in their input and return pagination.Result[T] {Items, TotalCount, Page}. Transform items with MapResult/MapResultErr — never build Result manually, so the echoed Page and TotalCount stay correct.
patterns.example: return pagination.MapResult(pagination.Result[dbEntity]{Items: rows, TotalCount: total, Page: params.Page}, toDomain), nil

patterns.name: Page.Offset()/Limit() in adapters
patterns.description: Adapters compute SQL paging via page.Offset() (=PageSize*(PageNumber-1)) and page.Limit() (=PageSize). Validate with page.Validate() (InvalidError if PageSize<0 or PageNumber<1); IsZero() is true only when both fields are 0.

patterns.name: NewPaginator + CollectAll for full scans
patterns.description: Wrap a list function as Paginator[T] via NewPaginator[T](fn), then CollectAll[T](ctx, paginator, pageSize) accumulates all pages until Items count < pageSize, capped at MAX_SAFE_ITER (10,000). On any page error it returns (nil, err) — never partial results.

patterns.name: Result.MarshalJSON flattens Page
patterns.description: Result[T].MarshalJSON() promotes PageSize and PageNumber to the top-level JSON object (Page has json:"-"). This flattening is load-bearing for SDK wire compatibility — do not override it.

key_file_guides.role: Page value type; Offset()/Limit()/Validate()/IsZero(); NewPage and NewPageFromRef (pointer query params).
key_file_guides.watch_for: PageNumber must be >=1 for valid pages; IsZero() (both 0) means uninitialised, not page 1.

key_file_guides.role: Result[T] with MapResult and MapResultErr; custom MarshalJSON flattens Page into the JSON root.
key_file_guides.watch_for: MapResultErr returns (Result{}, err) on the first mapping failure — no partial results.

key_file_guides.role: CollectAll iterating pages until a short page; MAX_SAFE_ITER=10,000 caps runaway paginators.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Returns (nil, err) on error — checking only len(items) silently drops the error.

key_file_guides.role: Paginator[T] interface and NewPaginator[T](fn); unexported paginator[T] is the only implementation.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Never implement Paginator[T] in domain code — always wrap a closure via NewPaginator.

anti_patterns: Computing SQL OFFSET/LIMIT directly in handler or service code instead of Page.Offset()/Limit().
Constructing pagination.Result manually instead of MapResult/MapResultErr.
Ignoring the error from CollectAll — it returns nil items on error.
Implementing a custom Paginator[T] type rather than using NewPaginator.
Mixing v2 cursor logic with offset Page/Result on the same endpoint — the contracts are incompatible.

decisions.decision: Result[T] flattens Page into the JSON root rather than nesting under a 'page' key.
decisions.rationale: The API wire format requires pageSize and page at the top level for SDK compatibility; the embedded Page is internal-only.

decisions.decision: CollectAll caps at MAX_SAFE_ITER=10,000 and returns (nil, error) on any page error.
decisions.rationale: Prevents infinite loops from misbehaving paginators and makes error handling unambiguous — callers get all items or nil, never a deceptive partial slice.

code_examples.scenario: Adapter list method using Page.Offset/Limit and returning pagination.Result
